title: A full platform redesign begins, driven by user feedback
content_html:
Cryptool is starting a full redesign of the platform interface, based on direct feedback from the user base over the last few months.

The aim is concrete: a more intuitive, faster and more polished experience across every module, with cleaner navigation and faster page loads as the headline improvements. The rollout will land over the coming weeks rather than as one big-bang release.

Thanks for the patience during the work. The redesign would not be possible without the volume and quality of feedback that came in, so please keep it coming.
author: Cryptool
